name: Forced Isekai
description:
The magical world of Thalmia is in grave danger, and you're going there to save it, wether you want it or not.

I̷̧̧̻͉̙̟̩̠̝̦͊͌̅̑͗͒̃̈́͋t'̷ṡ̶̢̢̛̘̦̳̝͇̫͓̼̭͋̇͆͂̓̓͌̌͝ͅ Ō̷͍͎͌͋̓̓̈́̆̓̀͝͠Ķ̵̛͙̣̹͈͈̲̒͒̍̍́͌̀̒̋͐̅̒͘ t̷̪̖̽o̶̧̝͇͔͍̼̭̠̦̩͐̓̄͘̕͜͜ͅ ̸̪̼̙͙̟̘̝̘̫̘̖̖̥̤͉̟̖͕̃͛͌̍̇̉̃͛͘ dì̴̡̛̹͇͍̻͑̉̽͊͒̐̎͐͑͂̍̉̀e̵͍̙̼̱̿̆͋̎̈́̀͆̎̈́̕͝ͅ
creator: KalzK
